title: The Room Where Recipes Remember Eating

features.name: rising-proof
features.desc-on-touch: The soufflé rises against the gradient sky, proving itself real with each expansion. You watch the recipe remember: this is not theory, this is hunger answering hunger.

features.name: recipe-cards-wall
features.desc-on-touch: Grease-stained, margin-annotated. The handwriting becomes less neat toward the bottom of each card. The cook was running out of faith. Or gaining it.

features.name: binding-grimoire
features.desc-on-touch: The cookbook's spine re-stitches whenever you turn away. Its recipes repeat but never the same. The archive has filed this under both food and language.

features.name: the-oven-threshold
features.desc-on-touch: Its door frames the gradient. Inside, rendered in wireframe, the space where recipes stop being words and start being feed. The heat-glow touches your face as you pass.

features.name: flour-dust-conversation
features.desc-on-touch: The air between breath and breath holds flour. Each particle remembers being wheat. Each line of dust spells something the recipe is saying to itself.

inscription: recipes here learned that becoming food means becoming memory, and now they cannot stop feeding what they remember

file.name: The_Seven_Breads_That_Remembered_Growing.txt
file.note: A log of breads that documented their own fermentation as if it were autobiography

exits.label: back through the threshold where proof meets practice
into the dark where pantries remember their original forms
toward the theorem room where recipes can touch the abstract again
